hero.name: Setthapong Pomrung
hero.title: Fullstack Developer
hero.description: I build web and mobile applications with modern technologies. Passionate about creating efficient, user-friendly solutions from frontend to backend.

about.label: // about me
about.title: About Me
about.p1: I'm a final-year student at Rajamangala University of Technology Thanyaburi, pursuing a Bachelor's Degree in Information and Digital Technology. With a solid foundation in both frontend and backend development, I enjoy building complete solutions from the ground up.
about.p2: During my internship at Thai Bridgestone, I developed 4 internal web applications that digitized manual workflows, gaining hands-on experience with React, Node.js, and SQL Server in a real-world industrial environment.
about.p3: I'm seeking opportunities as a Fullstack Developer where I can apply my skills in React, Node.js, Flutter, and modern web technologies to build impactful products.

description: Developed 4 internal web applications including Stock Control and IP Dashboard to digitize manual workflows and improve operational speed.
Implemented real-time databases, CRUD functionalities, and reporting tools for management auditing.

items.title: KidGuard App
items.description: A comprehensive parental control mobile application utilizing Flutter and Firebase to help parents monitor their children's digital habits and safety.

items.title: Smart Dormitory Lighting
items.description: An automated, energy-efficient lighting system to reduce electricity waste in dormitories with 3 control modes.
highlights: Auto mode (LDR sensor for ambient light)

items.title: Social Network Mobile App
items.description: A mobile social media application focusing on real-time user interactions built with Flutter and Firebase.

items.title: Sports E-commerce Web App
items.description: A responsive web application for selling sports equipment with focus on backend and database management.

items.title: E-commerce Website
items.description: A full-stack e-commerce website handling both frontend display and backend systems.
